evals.name: create-resources-homepage
evals.prompt:
Create a `homepage_resources.html` in `overrides/` that serves as a landing page for the CYBERBIZ 資源中心 (Resources Center). The page should have:

1. A hero section with the title 「資源中心」and subtitle about accessing docs, FAQs, changelogs, and glossaries, with a search CTA button
2. A 3-card grid highlighting the main resource categories: 常見問題 (FAQ), 更新紀錄 (Changelog), 詞彙表 (Glossary), each with Lucide icons
3. A bento layout with a left carousel showcasing 文檔資源 (Documentation, API References, Video Tutorials) and a right sidebar with a 最新消息 (Latest News) panel and a 快速連結 (Quick Links) panel
4. A 資源卡片 (Resource Cards) section at the bottom with 4 cards (開始使用指南, 最佳實踐, 影片教學, 技術白皮書) in a responsive grid

Follow the exact same architecture as `homepage_ec.html`:
- Extends `main.html`, NOT `base.html`
- `{{ super() }}` in extrahead, NO `{{ super() }}` in content
- Does NOT override scripts block
- Uses `ec-` prefix for all classes
- Material Symbols for icons
- Responsive at 768px and 1024px
- Dark mode via `[data-md-color-scheme="slate"]`
- No hardcoded `#fff` backgrounds
- Section spacing via `.ec-sect + .ec-sect`
- Carousel with auto-rotate and dot navigation

Read `references/homepage_ec.html` for the complete pattern before writing.

files.purpose: Reference template to base the architecture on

assertions.name: extends-main-html
assertions.description: The template extends main.html, not base.html

assertions.name: content-no-super
assertions.description: content block does NOT call {{ super() }}
